scenario_2_note: Tabella sistematiche aggiornata post-Scenario 2. I z-score di riferimento sono quelli del Confronto B (sigma_px equivalente, +3.09sigma). Le threshold e i verdict si riferiscono alla variazione della feature b2, non al z-score assoluto.

S1_redshift_effective.description: Sensibilita al redshift del mock di riferimento (z=0 vs z=0.5)
S1_redshift_effective.paper_note: Signal significance ranges from 5.40sigma (mock combined z=0+z=0.5) to 5.97sigma (mock z=0.5 only). Variation 0.57sigma < 1sigma threshold.

S2_tracer_sensitivity.description: Sensibilita al tracciatore osservativo (NGC vs SGC)
S2_tracer_sensitivity.verdict_note: Delta=1.15sigma appena sopra soglia 1sigma. Test varianza cosmica: P(|diff_mock|>0.032)=41.5% — differenza ordinaria. Entrambe le regioni mostrano segnale concordante: NGC +5.97sigma, SGC +7.13sigma.
S2_tracer_sensitivity.paper_note: Both NGC and SGC show concordant anomalies. The NGC-SGC difference (0.032) is consistent with cosmic variance between independent sky regions (P=41.5% in mock pairs).

S3_smoothing_scale.verdict_note: b2 dipende fortemente da sigma_px (+8.42sigma). Confronto B (sigma_px neutro) e il valore primario +3.09sigma. R=5 e scelta conservativa pre-specificata. Segnale si amplifica con R crescente — non soppresso.
S3_smoothing_scale.paper_note: b2_mean_persistence depends strongly on grid smoothing parameter sigma_px. We adopt Confronto B (matched sigma_px=0.640) as primary: z=+3.09sigma. At fixed physical scale R=5 Mpc/h (Confronto A): z=+5.97sigma. At identical physical scale R=10 Mpc/h (Confronto C): z=+12.65sigma. The grid discretization contributes ~2.9sigma to the Confronto A estimate.

S4_boss_dr12.paper_note: External replication with BOSS DR12 is identified as the highest-priority follow-up analysis. The absence of external replication is the primary limitation of this work.

summary.overall_assessment: S1 non-dominante. S2 borderline (varianza cosmica). S3 dominant ma segnale amplificato — R=5 conservativo. S4 deferred. Nessuna sistematica invalida il risultato primario.
